# cycloid_cloud_accounts (Data Source)

List Cycloid cloud accounts in an organization, optionally filtered by cloud provider.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cycloid_cloud_accounts" "aws" {
  cloud_provider = "aws"
}

output "aws_account_canonicals" {
  value = [for ca in data.cycloid_cloud_accounts.aws.cloud_accounts : ca.canonical]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `cloud_provider` (String) Optional cloud provider canonical to filter on (e.g. `aws`, `google`, `azurerm`, or a custom canonical).
- `organization` (String) The organization canonical to list cloud accounts from. Defaults to the provider's `default_organization`.

### Read-Only

- `cloud_accounts` (Attributes List) Matching cloud accounts. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--cloud_accounts))

<a id="nestedatt--cloud_accounts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `cloud_accounts`

Read-Only:

- `canonical` (String)
- `cloud_provider` (String)
- `credential_canonical` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `id` (Number)
- `name` (String)
- `owner` (String)
